title: CLMapping
description: Result of mapping an atlas cell type label to the Cell Ontology (CL). Produced by the ontology-term-lookup subagent.

cell_type_label.description: The input cell type name from the atlas report.

working_definition.description: 2-3 sentence synthesis of the cell type identity from the report (markers, location, function, lineage).

searches_performed.description: Every search string tried against OLS4, in order.

best_match.description: The single best CL term, or null if no match found.

justification.description: Why this match type was assigned. Must compare CL definition against working definition, naming specific features that align or diverge.

other_candidates.description: Alternative CL terms considered but not selected as best match.

recommendation.description: Actionable recommendation: use the mapping, or describe what new CL term is needed.

CLCandidate.description: A CL term selected as the best match.

cl_definition.description: Definition text from OLS4, copied verbatim.

RejectedCandidate.description: A CL term that was considered but rejected.

reason_rejected.description: Why this candidate was not selected.
